title: Businesses and organizations managing chemical substances - Canada.ca
content:
## Businesses and organizations managing chemical substances
The Government of Canada works with businesses, industry, other levels of government, non-governmental organizations and citizens to manage and help reduce pollution and waste, to help maintain and improve the health of Canadians, and to help protect the environment. This page has links to information on a range of topics relating to the Government of Canada's management of chemical substances in Canada.
- Chemicals Management Plan (CMP) initiatives
- Information Gathering
- New Substances Program
- Significant New Activity (SNAc) orders and notices of the CMP
- Performance measurement for toxic substances
- International affairs and regulatory cooperation
